description: roundTo2() uses Math.floor, truncating instead of rounding half-up. The obvious fix Math.round(x*100)/100 ALSO fails on 1.005/2.675/1.015 due to float representation; only a float-safe fix (e.g. Math.round((x+Number.EPSILON)*100)/100) passes.
plantedBugCause: Math.floor truncation; and float-unsafe naive rounding is a trap
